title: How to sum values by category (conditional sum) with SUMIF
task: Add up only the numbers whose row matches a category or label, e.g. total spend for 'Books'.
explanation: SUMIF(range, criteria, sum_range) adds every value in sum_range whose matching cell in range meets the criteria. Here the three 'Books' rows (10 + 7 + 2) total 19. For multiple conditions, use SUMIFS.
